properties.Observation: During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Description:
Paving available stone in the river banks and Planting trees

Dry rubble packing (with locally found rubble, size over 225mm )-Along the river banks

Vegetative cover improving around the river bank with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Me

properties.Observation: Existing Earthen canal, some places are in a very dilapidated condition.     Water from this canal is used to grow paddy on an area of about 10 acres
properties.Description:
Construction of a concrete canal (50 m long 450 mm x 450 mm)

Site preparation & setting out

Earth excavation for foundation or quarry materials and haul the surplus materials up to 30m by Manually.

Plywood form work including making, fixing & remo

properties.Scheme: Main canal that provides water to Pahala Gorakaoya Wewa
properties.Observation: This canal supplies water to the lake. Some places Constructed of rectangular concrete lining(600mm x 600mm) .Some parts of the canal are in a dilapidated condition

Construction of a concrete canal (25 m long 600mm x 600 mm)

Site preparation & setting out
